--- title: "Data Exploration and Fasting Glucose Quality Assessment" --- ## Data Loading and Preparation ::: {.cell execution_count=1} ``` {.python .cell-code} import os import pandas as pd import geopandas as gpd from dotenv import load_dotenv load_dotenv() ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=1} ``` True ``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell execution_count=2} ``` {.python .cell-code} # Show all rows pd.set_option('display.max_rows', None) # Show all columns pd.set_option('display.max_columns', None) # Show full cell content (stops long text from getting cut off) pd.set_option('display.max_colwidth', None) ``` ::: ::: {.cell execution_count=3} ``` {.python .cell-code} load_dotenv() dataset_path = os.getenv("CLEANED_DATASET_PATH") if dataset_path is None: raise ValueError("CLEANED_DATASET_PATH is not set in the environment.") df = pd.read_excel(dataset_path) df.head() ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=3} ```{=html}

``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell execution_count=6} ``` {.python .cell-code} df["Thana_clean"] = ( df["Thana"] .str.strip() .str.lower() .str.replace(r"\s*thana$", "", regex=True) ) ``` ::: ::: {.cell execution_count=7} ``` {.python .cell-code} mapping = { # Fatikchhari "fatikchari": "Fatikchhari", "fatickchori": "Fatikchhari", "fatikchhari": "Fatikchhari", # Banshkhali "bashkhali": "Banshkhali", "banshkhali": "Banshkhali", # Bakalia "bakolia": "Bakalia", "bakalia": "Bakalia", # Bayazid Bostami "baizid": "Bayazid Bostami", "bayazid": "Bayazid Bostami", "baizid bostami": "Bayazid Bostami", "bayezid bostami": "Bayazid Bostami", "bayazid bostami": "Bayazid Bostami", # Double Mooring "doublemooring": "Double Mooring", "double mooring": "Double Mooring", # Chawk Bazar "chowkbazar": "Chawk Bazar", "chawkbazar": "Chawk Bazar", # Pahartali "pahartoli": "Pahartali", "pahartali": "Pahartali", # Sitakunda "sitakundu": "Sitakunda", "sitakunda": "Sitakunda", # Chakaria "chokoria": "Chakaria", "chakaria": "Chakaria", # Mirsharai "mirsarai": "Mirsharai", "mirsharai": "Mirsharai", # Karnaphuli "karnafuly": "Karnaphuli", "karnafuli": "Karnaphuli", "karnaphuli": "Karnaphuli", # Halishahar "halisahar": "Halishahar", "halishahar": "Halishahar", # Jorargonj "jorarganj": "Jorargonj", "zorargonj": "Jorargonj", "jorargonj": "Jorargonj", # Akbar Shah "akbarshah": "Akbar Shah", "akbar shah": "Akbar Shah", # Patenga "potenga": "Patenga", "patenga": "Patenga", # EPZ "epz": "EPZ", # Khulshi "khulshi": "Khulshi", # Kotwali "kotwali": "Kotwali", # Panchlaish "panchlaish": "Panchlaish", # Chandgaon "chandgaon": "Chandgaon", # Bandor / Bandar "bandar": "Bandar", # Anwara "anowara": "Anwara", "anwara": "Anwara", # Sitakunda duplicate handled already # Raozan "raozan": "Raozan", # Rangunia "rangunia": "Rangunia", # Boalkhali "boalkhali": "Boalkhali", # Sandwip "sandwip": "Sandwip", # Lohagara "lohagara": "Lohagara", # Hathazari "hathazari": "Hathazari", # Cox's Bazar Sadar "cox's bazar sadar": "Cox's Bazar Sadar", # Khagrachhari Sadar "khagrachari sadar": "Khagrachhari Sadar", "khagrachhari sadar": "Khagrachhari Sadar", } ``` ::: ::: {.cell execution_count=8} ``` {.python .cell-code} df["Thana_normalized"] = df["Thana_clean"].map(mapping) ``` ::: ::: {.cell execution_count=9} ``` {.python .cell-code} df["Thana_normalized"] = df["Thana_normalized"].fillna( df["Thana_clean"].str.title() ) ``` ::: ::: {.cell execution_count=10} ``` {.python .cell-code} # overwrite original column with normalized values df["Thana"] = df["Thana_normalized"] # drop helper columns df = df.drop(columns=["Thana_clean", "Thana_normalized"]) ``` ::: ::: {.cell execution_count=11} ``` {.python .cell-code} df.groupby("Thana")["ID"].count().reset_index(name="Total_IDs") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=11} ```{=html}
